name: QA 975
description:
PCP QA Test No. 975

Exercise iostat2pcp with locally installed iostat.



Copyright (c) 2014 Red Hat.



check-group-exclude: iostat

**To reproduce this test, please run:**

    build/ci/ci-run.py centos-stream9-container reproduce

statusMessage:
[failed, exit status 1] - output mismatch (see 975.out.bad)
2,7c2,4
< Comparing stock iostat output to PCP archive
< Verifying sample 1
< Verifying sample 2
< Comparing extended iostat output to PCP archive
< Verifying sample 1
< Verifying sample 2
---
> munmap_chunk(): invalid pointer
> Aborted (core dumped)
> Arrgh: non-zero exit status from 1st iostat2pcp
Check local PMCD is still alive ...
